title: [v1.19] vendor containers/image@v5.10.5
body:
Fixes are needed to fix the remaining issues of #1589.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@nalind @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

Do we need a BZ to get that into RHEL 8.4?  Fairly annoying bug (see https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1589).

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.19/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
We'll need a BZ, but I think we need another total version dance and may just do the one for that which would include this fix too.

> We'll need a BZ, but I think we need another total version dance and may just do the one for that which would include this fix too.

Perfect. Let me know in case the dance doesn't make it into 8.4. If not, I'll open a BZ.
